role_summary: the due diligence analyst evaluates financial, tax, and operational aspects of target  companies during transactions.
responsibilities: • conduct financial and tax due diligence   • analyze historical financ ial performance and risks   • identify deal risks and red flags   • prepare due diligence reports and summaries   • support transaction decision -making   • coordinate with clients and advisors
qualifications: • ca with due diligence experience   • strong analytical and  investigative skills   • attention to detail and reporting expertise
